description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- build(deps-dev): bump @eslint/js from 9.39.2 to 9.39.4 by @dependabot[bot] in #1708
- build(deps-dev): bump @next/eslint-plugin-next from 16.1.5 to 16.2.7 by @dependabot[bot] in #1707
- build(deps): bump zod from 4.3.6 to 4.4.3 by @dependabot[bot] in #1706
- build(deps-dev): bump concurrently from 9.2.1 to 10.0.3 by @dependabot[bot] in #1705
- build(deps): bump deps by @zevnda in #1719
- fix(ui): incorrect game card grid styles by @zevnda in #1720
Full Changelog: 5.3.1...5.3.2
